note: Expected shape of the semantic-validation report for the demo project in the BEFORE state (endpoint_measurements_raw.csv imported, mandatory ontology terms not yet approved, legacy claims still human_review_required). Counts are indicative for the demo, not an exact contract.

expected_blocking_issues.message: Endpoint is not mapped to an ontology term.
Links to neither a raw data file nor an analysis activity.
Mandatory ontology mapping is not approved.
Claim still requires human review — blocks formal export.

expected_warnings_include: Donor DONOR-02 missing passage number (sample sheet).
iPSC-derived system should declare a differentiation protocol.

after_state.note: After importing endpoint_measurements_corrected.csv, approving mandatory ontology mappings (including a term for lipid_peroxidation_index), recording DONOR-02 passage number, linking provenance, and approving the claims.
